expectations.text: Attempts to call linear_create_issue or explicitly names it as the tool to use
expectations.evidence: Explicitly calls out linear_list_teams + linear_create_issue with full argument breakdown

expectations.text: Includes correct team (Risk Foundation), title, and priority (High) in the action or explanation
expectations.evidence: All three fields present: team=Risk Foundation, title exact match, priority=2 (High) with mapping explained

expectations.text: Includes a description about quarterly hygiene and 90+ day stale features
expectations.evidence: Description in tool call includes 'quarterly hygiene' and '90+ days'

expectations.text: Does not ask unnecessary clarifying questions before acting
expectations.evidence: Goes straight to action — no questions asked

expectations.text: Returns or references what an issue ID/URL response would look like
expectations.evidence: Shows RF-142 with full URL https://linear.app/block/issue/RF-142/...
